title: Norpro 693 White Marble Mortar and Pestle, 1 EA
description:
About this item
Marble mortar and pestles for crushing foods and pills
For crushing herbs and spices to release their full flavor
Hand washing recommended
Measures 3.75"/9.5cm tall by 2"/5cm diameter
Made of beautiful marble:holds 3 ounce
reviews_5s:
I was looking for a smallish mortar and pestle for light duty kitchen work. This one is made of a nice fine grained ceramic that seems pretty sturdy and cleans up well. It is just a no-nonsense tool and not too fancy for daily use in my kitchen. Seems to go through the dishwasher just fine.This is a wonderful little mortar/pestle set! It's made of marble, and the materials feel solid and good quality in hand. I use it for blending/crushing herbs, and it's does the job beautifully. The inside is course so it makes pulverizing herbs (or anything) easy. It's not big so it fits nicely in my cabinet. Great find.Great mortar and pestle - i mostly use it for spices. It's pretty sturdy and heavy (like it should be). Compact enough to not take a lot of space, gets the job done. And looks beautiful.
Tip: If you've never used a mortar and pestle before, make sure you place it on a hard solid surface before you start pounding :)I liked this producr, as the title suggests it is an attractive no nonsense design and fit for purpose. It was deliveted on time and I am very pleased.This is a beautiful piece at a great prices.This works perfectly for all my spices. I first bought and tried a spice grinder which did not work at all. This is a heavy marble with a nice heavy pestle. It is the perfect size for spices and looks great on my counter. I highly recommend this over a grinder.My husband & I have been searching for a good mortal & pestle that won’t rust & cleans easily. I came across this & I thought I give this a try. It crushes my toddlers’ vitamins into really fine powder texture so we can put it in their cereal. We also put it in the dishwasher (top rack) and it comes out clean as a whistle. My husband loves it & it is very convenient. I also received it on time & in excellent condition. 5 out of 5 stars!It is true this a small item but it is perfect for what I needed it for. My salt grinder was missing a part, so I bought this to grind salt. It is important to wash it first before use. Dustiness is not unusual in an item made of porcelain, unused and boxed for any period of time.I wish the handle had an easier grip otherwise it's exactly what I was looking forPerfect in every way. Beautiful. Heavy. Ez to use .

I use this every single day. One of my best purchases ever. Such excellent quality. Perfect for grinding pills and supplements...
reviews_1s:
This Norpro mortar and pestle, constructed of heavy porcelain works like a charm. In a perfect world the smooth slip on the exterior of the bowl and the upper part of the pestle would not be so slippery - but it's the nature of this kind of ceramic. I also don't appreciate that it is yet another item made in China, a fact not noted in the description. Those of us concerned with such things as human rights and the American economy are concerned about such omissions.first the packaging was horrible and the pieces inside were actually rolling around in the box which apparently was open and re-taped. It had air bubble packaging that was way too small for the box and product. Lucky it was not broken when It arrived. Thank goodness it was made of marble.

The mortar and pestle were very rough cut with heavy milling lines inside cup - not smooth at all.

Will not buy from againI love it it's perfect. I'm upset on how it got to me though, I'm surprised it didn't get broken. It was out of it's box and way loose, it was poorly shipped, very poorly shipped.White marble is very cheap quality and is not worth the money. A thin transparent film is getting peeled off from the mortar after several use. The pestle also start shredding pieces after few usage.
(Has been used delicately)Purchased stainless in place. Did not use. Too coarse a grind to work with pills.Larger than expected (that what she said) there’s grooves in the bowl which aren’t ideal for “salt” if you get what I’m saying.Super tiny! Not to mention the inside is super ruff and was extremely dusty when I took it out of the package ☹️not good. some marble pieces came into my food because it is not sturdy. I returned it.Perfect size and price. The outside is nice and smooth but the inside is way to rough, a little texture is nice for gripping the seeds but this to rough and unfinished, so when the seeds are ground they all stick in the roughness and you can't get them out.this is made to look at not use
